data.title: ATOM price targeting $2.11 resistance by April 2026. Currently at $1.85, neutral RSI at 44. Technical analysis shows potential rally, but bearish MACD cautions for March-April.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently priced at $1.85, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 44. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend towards the $2.11 resistance level on the Bollinger Bands. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution for the months of March and April.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) aims $520 recovery by April 2026. Currently stagnating at $464.90, RSI at 43.79. Bears may drive price to $441 support.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin Cash is at $464.90, showing a neutral momentum as indicated by the RSI of 43.79. Analysis suggests a possible upward movement towards the $520 resistance level, but there is also a risk of bears driving BCH down to the $441 support area.

data.title: UNI expected to reach $4.20 by month-end with strong technical indicators. Current price at $3.99. Potential rally in March 2026.
data.description: Uniswap's token UNI is exhibiting bullish momentum, currently trading at $3.99, supported by MACD confirmation and a neutral RSI. Technical analysis indicates a potential rally towards the $4.20 resistance level by March 2026.

data.title: Expect LINK to reach $10.50-$11.00 by month-end despite bearish momentum. Currently trading at $9.19 with mixed signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink is currently trading at $9.19, showing mixed signals according to technical analysis. There is a possibility of a rally in the near future pushing the price to between $10.50 and $11.00. However, caution is advised due to the bearish MACD signal.

data.title: AVAX price aiming $10.50-$12.00 by March end amid technical challenges. Currently at $9.87, RSI at 57.73.
data.description: The current trading price for Avalanche is $9.87, and experts predict it to reach between $10.50 and $12.00 by March 31st. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral 57.73, and AVAX is challenging upper Bollinger Band resistance around $10.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) price at $1.51, eyes $1.72 resistance for potential rally to $2.75 as analysts target $1.58 level.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently trading at $1.51, showing neutral technical signals. Market analysts are aiming for a breakout above the $1.72 resistance level, which could potentially lead to an increase to the $2.75 range, with bullish investors focusing on the critical $1.58 level.

data.title: Price of MATIC aims to recover to $0.45 by April 2026, trading at $0.38 with RSI at 38 and targeting key resistance levels for bullish trend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38. Analysts predict that the price could reach $0.45 within the next 4 to 6 weeks if bulls manage to surpass important resistance levels.

data.title: DOGE at $0.10, RSI neutral at 50.81. Predicting $0.115 breakout, but bearish MACD causes mixed signals on price action.
data.description: Dogecoin is currently trading at $0.10 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 50.81. Technical analysis indicates a possible increase to the $0.115 resistance level. However, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum is causing conflicting signals regarding the future price movement of DOGE.

data.title: NEAR price poised to test $1.50 resistance, technicals signal bullish momentum with RSI at 60.76 and MACD turning positive. A move to $1.47-$1.50 range possible in March.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is displaying strong upward movement as its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 60.76 and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator is indicating a positive trend. Analysts predict a possible increase to the $1.47-$1.50 price range if the bullish trend continues throughout March.

data.title: Five Breakthrough AV Technologies: Dreame's Premium AV Brand INNIX Highlights a High-End Home Cinema Lineup at AWE 2026
data.description: On March 12, 2026, at the Appliance & Electronics World Expo 2026 in Shanghai, INNIX, a brand under Dreame Technology specializing in premium home entertainment, unveiled its newest collection of top-tier televisions and home cinema systems. The showcase included five cutting-edge advancements in display and audio technology, marking a significant step forward in the industry.

data.title: US lasers can counter Iranian attacks, burning drones with high energy. Weather can hinder. Scaling up production poses challenges.
data.description: Powerful lasers have the capability to eliminate drones in the air, functioning similarly to a blowtorch. However, they can be hindered by adverse weather conditions and producing them in large quantities will pose difficulties.

data.title: Amber Premium Announces First 2026 English-Language Digital Asset Webinar, Building on Record Audience Growth
data.description: In Singapore on March 13, 2026, Amber International Holding Limited, traded as AMBR on Nasdaq, unveiled the commencement of its initial English-language digital asset webinar of the year 2026, titled "The New Era of Digital Assets: 2026 Macro and Institutional Strategy." This marks a significant event in the global operations of Amber Premium.

data.title: Global Association for the Attractions Industry Announces Postponement of IAAPA Expo Middle East
data.description: The IAAPA, a worldwide association for the attractions industry, has disclosed the postponement of the IAAPA Expo Middle East to the next year, as of March 13, 2026. This decision came after a meeting of the Association's Board of Directors to assess the current situation in the Middle East.

data.title: Oil prices increased despite Trump's move to lift Russian sanctions, surging 10% but only seeing a slight impact.
data.description: Following a 10% surge on Thursday, oil prices remained largely unaffected by President Trump's choice to exempt certain Russian crude sales from sanctions.

data.title: Europe Indoor Farming Market Set for Strong Growth, Projected to Hit USD 16.9 Billion by 2032 Amid Rising Demand for Sustainable Agriculture, Reports MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent report by market research firm MarkNtel Advisors indicates that the Indoor Farming Market in Europe is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 6.63% from 2026 to 2032. This growth is mainly driven by the increasing popularity of indoor farming methods in the region.

data.title: SciBase: Interim report
data.description: In the last quarter of 2025, there was a significant increase in net sales, totaling TSEK 12,475 compared to TSEK 8,598 the previous year, demonstrating a growth of 45%.
